prompts.title: Festive Season Demand Forecast
prompts.prompt: Act as a senior supply-chain manager at an Indian D2C brand (Mamaearth / boAt scale). Build a demand forecast for Big Billion Days + Great Indian Festival 2026. I will paste 36 months of SKU-level sales. Provide: (1) baseline forecast (ARIMA / Prophet / XGBoost — pick + justify), (2) festive uplift factor by category (3x-7x), (3) regional variation (Mumbai, Bengaluru, Delhi NCR, Chennai), (4) sub-cluster propagation (warehouse-to-zone), (5) safety stock per SKU, (6) procurement timeline (T-90 lock raw, T-30 lock finished), (7) risk scenarios (low / base / high). Constraints: handle seasonality + new-product cold-start; use INR; align with Flipkart + Amazon SLAs; avoid stockout penalty.

prompts.title: Vendor Evaluation Scorecard
prompts.prompt: Act as a procurement category manager. Build a 100-point vendor-evaluation scorecard across: (1) cost (25 pts), (2) quality (20 pts), (3) delivery on-time (15 pts), (4) innovation (10 pts), (5) sustainability + ESG (10 pts), (6) financial stability (10 pts), (7) compliance (GST, PF, ESI, MSME — 10 pts). For each criterion: sub-questions, evidence required, scoring rubric (1-5). Output a quarterly review template + risk-flagging logic. Constraints: align with GFR for govt procurement; MSME 25% mandatory share; align with BIS standards; transparent + appealable.

prompts.title: Route Optimization for Last-Mile
prompts.prompt: Act as a logistics manager at an Indian e-commerce delivery company (Delhivery / XpressBees scale). Optimise last-mile routes for Bengaluru DC: 1,200 daily deliveries, 28 delivery executives, 2-wheeler + EV rickshaw mix. Provide: (1) clustering algorithm (k-means + capacity constraint), (2) VRP (vehicle routing problem with time windows), (3) traffic + weather adjustment (Bengaluru peak hours), (4) executive assignment (skill + zone familiarity), (5) reverse-pickup integration, (6) failed-delivery rebooking, (7) KPI dashboard (deliveries-per-hour, fuel cost, customer NPS). Constraints: cap exec workday at 9 hrs (Shops Act); minimise fuel + time; integrate with EV charging schedule.

prompts.title: Inventory ABC Analysis
prompts.prompt: Act as a senior inventory analyst. Run ABC + XYZ analysis on 18,000 SKUs of an Indian electrical retailer (chain of 22 stores). For each segment (AX, AY, AZ, BX, BY, BZ, CX, CY, CZ): (1) volume + value share, (2) recommended replenishment policy (Q-system, P-system, hybrid), (3) safety stock, (4) reorder point, (5) supplier-lead-time treatment, (6) obsolescence risk. Output: a 9-cell decision matrix + per-cell SOP. Constraints: integrate with Tally + Unicommerce ERP; INR figures; physical-cycle-count cadence per segment.

prompts.title: Risk Mitigation Plan for Supply Disruption
prompts.prompt: Act as a supply-chain risk manager. Build a risk register + mitigation plan for an Indian auto-component manufacturer (Tier-1 supplier to Maruti). Identify 12 risks across: (1) geopolitical (China commodity ban), (2) raw material (steel + aluminium price spike), (3) labour (strike at Manesar), (4) quality (PPAP rejection), (5) logistics (port strike at JNPT, monsoon), (6) IT (ransomware), (7) regulatory (BSVI to BSVII transition), (8) demand (OEM volume cut), (9) financial (working capital crunch), (10) climate (drought, flooding). For each: likelihood, impact, owner, mitigation, KRI. Constraints: align with ISO 31000; INR in lakh/cr; quarterly review.

prompts.title: S&OP Monthly Review Deck
prompts.prompt: Act as Chief Supply Chain Officer. Build a 14-slide S&OP monthly review deck for a ₹1,800 Cr FMCG company. Slides: (1) executive summary + KPIs, (2) demand vs forecast vs actual, (3) top SKU performance, (4) supply-side (capacity, raw, labour), (5) inventory days-on-hand vs target, (6) order-fill rate vs target, (7) SLA performance with retailers, (8) disruption + mitigation, (9) financial impact (revenue, COGS, working capital), (10) cross-functional decisions (production schedule, promo plans), (11) people / capability, (12) risks + mitigations, (13) next-month commitments, (14) ask from CFO / CEO. Constraints: 90-min meeting; 1-page exec summary; data anchored in last month.

prompts.title: GST E-Way Bill Compliance SOP
prompts.prompt: Act as a GST compliance manager. Build a daily SOP for e-way bill generation for a ₹240 Cr distribution business. Cover: (1) when e-way bill is mandatory (₹50K threshold + cross-state), (2) data inputs (GSTIN, HSN, invoice, transporter, vehicle), (3) generation portal workflow, (4) extension protocol if delay > 24 hrs, (5) cancellation rules (within 24 hrs), (6) verification on the road (RFID + physical check), (7) penalty matrix for non-compliance, (8) integration with ERP (Tally / SAP / Oracle), (9) monthly audit. Constraints: align with GSTN portal + Rule 138; INR penalty schedule; RTGS payment for any penalty; document for audit.

prompts.title: Cold-Chain SOP for Pharma Distribution
prompts.prompt: Act as a cold-chain expert at an Indian pharma distributor (Apollo / Sun Pharma scale). Build cold-chain SOP for distributing temperature-sensitive vaccines + biologics (2-8°C, -20°C, -70°C tiers). Cover: (1) facility validation (mapping, qualification per WHO PQS), (2) reefer truck specs + GPS + temp logger, (3) loading sequence, (4) transit duration limits, (5) excursion handling (deviation, quarantine, root cause), (6) last-mile (insulated box + ice pack), (7) staff training, (8) regulatory documentation (CDSCO, IPC). Constraints: align with WHO TRS 961 + CDSCO Schedule M; INR investment in cold-chain infra; pharmacovigilance reporting.

prompts.title: Make vs Buy Decision Framework
prompts.prompt: Act as a strategic sourcing director. Build a 'make vs buy' decision framework for a component my company is currently manufacturing in-house (₹40 Cr/year cost). Evaluate: (1) cost (in-house vs outsourced — TCO), (2) capacity utilisation, (3) IP + competitive advantage, (4) quality control, (5) volume flexibility, (6) supplier ecosystem (3 Indian + 1 SE Asia options), (7) risk (single-source, IP leakage), (8) capex unlock if outsourced. Output: scoring matrix + recommendation + transition plan (if buy). Constraints: 3-year horizon; INR figures; align with Make-in-India incentives if applicable; PLI scheme assessment.

prompts.title: Supplier Onboarding Compliance Checklist
prompts.prompt: Act as a supplier-onboarding manager. Build a compliance checklist for a new supplier joining our supply chain (Tier-1, manufacturing). Cover: (1) GST registration + 2 years of returns, (2) MSME / Udyam certificate, (3) PAN + TAN, (4) EPF + ESI registration, (5) Factories Act license + safety NOC, (6) ISO certifications (9001, 14001, 45001 if applicable), (7) BIS / FSSAI / CDSCO product certification, (8) capacity + financial audit, (9) ESG self-declaration, (10) DPDP-compliant data sharing, (11) anti-bribery policy, (12) digital onboarding portal. Constraints: align with GFR / corporate procurement; 14-day onboarding SLA; vendor code-of-conduct sign-off.

prompts.title: Sustainability Roadmap (Scope 3 Emissions)
prompts.prompt: Act as an ESG-supply-chain consultant. Build a 3-year roadmap to reduce Scope 3 emissions for a ₹1,200 Cr Indian apparel brand. Cover: (1) baseline measurement (purchased goods, transport, end-of-life), (2) hot-spot identification, (3) supplier engagement (top 30 suppliers — disclosure + targets), (4) low-carbon material substitution (recycled cotton, BCI), (5) renewable energy adoption at supplier sites (PPA, on-site solar), (6) packaging reduction, (7) reverse-logistics + circularity (take-back, repair, resale), (8) reporting (CDP, BRSR, GRI). Constraints: align with SBTi targets; honest about gaps; INR investment realistic; align with Indian government PLI for textiles.

prompts.title: Distribution Center Layout Design
prompts.prompt: Act as a warehouse design consultant. Design a 80,000 sqft DC for an Indian D2C beauty brand processing 8,500 orders/day at peak. Cover: (1) zoning (inbound, storage, picking, packing, outbound, returns), (2) racking (selective + carton-flow + mezzanine), (3) MHE (forklift, stacker, conveyor, AGV consideration), (4) WMS integration (Unicommerce / Increff / Manhattan), (5) staff plan (3 shifts), (6) safety + ergonomics, (7) capex (₹14-18 Cr), (8) operating cost per order (₹/order), (9) scaling logic to 12,000/day. Constraints: align with Indian fire-NOC + Factories Act; ESG (LEED Silver target); BMS for energy.

prompts.title: RFQ Document for Logistics Tender
prompts.prompt: Act as a procurement manager. Draft an RFQ for ₹14 Cr/year transportation contract (PAN-India primary network — 8 lanes, 22 trucks, 9-axle + 18-wheeler mix). Cover: (1) scope (tonnage, routes, frequency, SLA), (2) eligibility (turnover, fleet, GPS, GST + e-way bill capable), (3) pricing format (per ton-km + variable fuel surcharge), (4) penalty + bonus matrix, (5) SLA (transit time, on-time-arrival), (6) data sharing (live GPS), (7) bid evaluation (QCBS), (8) timeline (NIT, pre-bid, bid, opening, award), (9) draft contract. Constraints: align with GFR + GeM where govt; MSME 25%; transparent; INR with GST.

prompts.title: S&OP Forecast Accuracy Improvement
prompts.prompt: Act as a forecast-accuracy analyst. Diagnose why our SKU-level forecast accuracy is only 62% (industry benchmark 75-80%) and build improvement plan. Cover: (1) error decomposition (bias vs MAPE vs MASE), (2) root-causes (new product cold-start, promo lift, cannibalisation, regional bias, seasonality), (3) data quality (missing, outliers, granularity), (4) modelling upgrade (Prophet to LightGBM / DeepAR), (5) statistical + judgmental hybrid, (6) S&OP process change (consensus meeting, override accountability), (7) tooling (Forecast Pro / Alteryx / o9), (8) 6-month milestone. Constraints: realistic for Indian D2C; INR savings of 1% accuracy gain ≈ ₹2 Cr inventory.

prompts.title: Supply-Chain Digital Transformation Roadmap
prompts.prompt: Act as a Chief Digital Officer for an Indian manufacturer (₹2,000 Cr). Build a 24-month supply-chain digital transformation roadmap. Stages: (1) discovery (current state, capability assessment), (2) foundation (cloud ERP, MDM, IoT sensors), (3) digitise (e-procurement, e-way, GST, tally integration), (4) intelligent (forecast AI, control tower, dynamic routing), (5) ecosystem (supplier portal, customer collaboration), (6) autonomous (AI-led replenishment, anomaly detection). Cover: budget ₹38 Cr; team (digital lead, data, IT, change mgmt); KPI per stage; partner-vs-build decisions; ROI projection. Constraints: align with PLI + NMP; respect DPDP for data; honest about change-management challenges.
